CustomField.description: The variant (info, error, success, warning) for the toast or theme for the alert (default, shade, inverse, alt-inverse, success, info, warning, error, offline).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The variant (info, error, success, warning) for the toast or theme for the alert (default, shade, inverse, alt-inverse, success, info, warning, error, offline).
CustomField.label: Variant or Theme
